title: Object.finalize() Method Should Remain Protected When Overriding
description: The contract of the Object.finalize() method dictates that only the Garbage Collector should call this method. If this method is made public, it can mislead others into believing that it can be used by any caller, which is not the case.
recommendation: Ensure that the Object.finalize() method remains protected when overriding. This method should not be made public as it is meant only for the Garbage Collector.
impact: Making the Object.finalize() method public can lead to misuse as it suggests that any caller can use it. This can potentially affect the Garbage Collector's functionality and the overall performance of the application.

checks.message: Object.finalize() method should remain protected when overriding
